news.text: Spain closes airspace to US planes involved in Iran war, defence minister says - Reuters
Ukraine's drone masters eye Iran war to kickstart export ambitions - Reuters
LME aluminium nears four year peak after Iran attacks on Gulf smelters - Reuters
Iran confirms death of Revolutionary Guards Navy Commander Tangsiri, statement says - Reuters
Exclusive: European aviation body eyes safety risks as conflict squeezes flight corridors - Reuters
Luxury carmakers' gold-leafed Gulf profits under threat from Iran war - Reuters

brief:
◆ Market Overview

Risk-off sentiment dominates pre-market as escalating Iran conflict sends VIX spiking 7.6% to 39.41. All major indices down 1.7-2.0% with SPY at $634.09, signaling a potential test of key support levels as geopolitical uncertainty grips markets.

◆ What to Watch

  • Iran War Escalation: Revolutionary Guards Navy Commander confirmed dead, Spain closing airspace to US planes - momentum clearly accelerating
  • Commodity Surge: LME aluminum hitting 4-year highs after Iran attacks Gulf smelters - industrial metals in focus
  • Flight Corridor Disruption: European aviation safety concerns as conflict squeezes air routes - travel sector headwinds
  • US-Iran Talks: Pakistan hosting negotiations while border tensions with Afghanistan flare - diplomatic wildcard
⚠ Bear Case
War premium expanding rapidly with direct infrastructure attacks. If conflict spreads beyond current theater, expect sustained risk-off rotation and multiple compression across growth sectors.
⚡ Key Driver
Energy sector only green space (+1.69%) while defensive plays (Utilities +0.57%, Staples +0.79%) outperforming. Classic flight-to-safety pattern emerging.

◆ Sector Rotation

Clear defensive rotation underway with Energy leading (+1.69%) and Financials lagging worst (-2.53%). Consumer Discretionary getting hammered (-2.89%) as war fears trump spending optimism. Utilities and Staples holding up as expected safe havens.

◆ Levels That Matter

  • SPY Support: $630 critical - break triggers acceleration toward $615-620 zone
  • VIX Resistance: 40 level key psychological barrier - breach opens door to 45+ spike
  • QQQ Watch: $560 must hold or next stop is $540 major support confluence
  • XLE Breakout: Energy pushing toward $95 resistance - war premium could drive continuation

Not a prediction. A preparation. Make your plan before the bell.
